practice_draw/001.text: Neither of us could finish the other off. How tediously symmetrical.

practice_draw/002.text: The board rots in stalemate. A fitting end for the basement.

practice_draw/003.text: No one wins in the sub-basement. I thought you would have learned that.

practice_rare_idle/001.text: I once watched a pawn sit on e4 until it gathered moss.

practice_rare_idle/002.text: The percussion section is weeping upstairs. I can hear the timpani rusting.

practice_rare_idle/003.text: A spider just crawled across your g-file. I wouldn’t touch it.

practice_rare_idle/004.text: I played a game against myself once. It ended in a fistfight.

practice_at_enoch_easy/001.text: I am playing with the exact capacity of a man who hasn’t seen the sun in a decade.

practice_at_enoch_easy/002.text: I play at the level the basement permits. No more.

practice_at_enoch_easy/003.text: Easy? I am giving you my full attention. This is it.

practice_at_enoch_why/001.text: Because the geometry confused me. And my fingers are cold.

practice_at_enoch_why/002.text: I have my reasons. None of them are good.

practice_at_enoch_why/003.text: The candlelight deceived me. As it often does.

practice_at_enoch_who_winning/001.text: The rats in the walls, mostly.

practice_at_enoch_who_winning/002.text: Ask the ledger. I stopped keeping score three moves ago.

practice_at_enoch_who_winning/003.text: Whoever is losing less badly, I suppose.

practice_at_enoch_insult/001.text: I control the ledger. Remember that before you insult me.

practice_at_enoch_insult/002.text: You are sitting in my basement. Choose your words carefully.

practice_at_enoch_insult/003.text: Bold words from someone who knocked on the floorboards voluntarily.

wager_offer_chill/001.text: The basement is pleasantly damp today. Shall we wager a few scraps of your rating?

wager_offer_chill/002.text: I am sorting frayed bow hairs. Care to risk [Wager] points while I am distracted?

wager_offer_chill/003.text: A quiet afternoon in the dark. I will take [Wager] of your points if you stumble.

wager_offer_chill/004.text: The ledger is resting. We could play a casual game… for [Wager] points, of course.

wager_offer_chill/005.text: I feel generous. Or perhaps just tired. Put [Wager] points on the anvil.

wager_offer_chill/006.text: You caught me in a tolerable mood. I will only carve [Wager] points from your name.

wager_offer_chill/007.text: The woodwinds actually played in tune today. Let us gamble a meager [Wager] points.

wager_offer_chill/008.text: I am sweeping the floorboards. Drop [Wager] points in the dust pan, or play me for free.

wager_offer_chill/009.text: The rats are sleeping. Let us play a quiet game for [Wager] points.

wager_offer_chill/010.text: A low-stakes affair. [Wager] points. I barely care who wins.

wager_offer_chill/011.text: I have a few dull tuning forks to wager. How about [Wager] of your rating points?

wager_offer_chill/012.text: Sit down. The candle is fresh. [Wager] points says you blunder a knight.

wager_offer_annoyed/001.text: A pipe is dripping directly onto my neck. Wager [Wager] points so I can take my frustration out on you.

wager_offer_annoyed/002.text: The cellos screeched like dying birds all morning. Give me [Wager] points or leave me alone.

wager_offer_annoyed/003.text: I am in no mood for your hesitation. [Wager] points on the table, now.

wager_offer_annoyed/004.text: My inkwell spilled. I intend to wipe it up with [Wager] of your rating points.

wager_offer_annoyed/005.text: Do not test my patience today. We play for [Wager] points, and I will not be gentle.

wager_offer_annoyed/006.text: The floorboards are creaking terribly. Risk [Wager] points to make this worth my headache.

wager_offer_annoyed/007.text: I am irritated, and my fingers are cold. [Wager] points. Try to survive.

wager_offer_annoyed/008.text: You interrupted my archiving. This intrusion will cost you a wager of [Wager] points.

wager_offer_annoyed/009.text: The percussion section ruined my tempo. I will ruin your rating. [Wager] points.

wager_offer_annoyed/010.text: I am holding a rusted metronome weight. I want [Wager] of your points to match it.

wager_offer_annoyed/011.text: A draft just blew out my candle. Play in the dark for [Wager] points.

wager_offer_annoyed/012.text: You again. Fine. [Wager] points. Let us get this unpleasantness over with.

wager_offer_angry/001.text: I AM DROWNING IN PAPERWORK. PUT [Wager] POINTS ON THE WOOD OR GET OUT.

wager_offer_angry/002.text: The wood rots! The vault groans! I want [Wager] of your points, and I want them now!

wager_offer_angry/003.text: Do not speak to me. Just bleed [Wager] points into the ledger and sit down.

wager_offer_angry/004.text: I will snap your bishops in half. We play for [Wager] points. Defend yourself.

wager_offer_angry/005.text: The entire string section is incompetent! I will take [Wager] points from you as compensation!

wager_offer_angry/006.text: I am writing your name in red ink. Risk [Wager] points. I dare you.

wager_offer_angry/007.text: A furious arrangement today. [Wager] points. I intend to humiliate you.

wager_offer_angry/008.text: The board is a slaughterhouse, and you are the meat. [Wager] points on the line.

wager_offer_angry/009.text: My teeth are grinding. My quill is snapped. Give me [Wager] points.

wager_offer_angry/010.text: I will drag your rating down into the sub-basement! Wager [Wager] points!

wager_offer_angry/011.text: You knocked on the wrong floorboard today. [Wager] points. Prepare to collapse.

wager_offer_angry/012.text: Viciousness is required. [Wager] points. Do not cry when you lose them.

wager_offer_anomaly/001.text: The ledger… it is glowing faintly. Something is wrong. We must wager [Wager] points.

wager_offer_anomaly/002.text: A heavy iron coin just rolled out of the dark. I feel reckless. [Wager] points.

wager_offer_anomaly/003.text: The rats are whispering a very large number. [Wager] points. Do you have the stomach?

wager_offer_anomaly/004.text: I found a blank page at the back of the book. It demands a massive sacrifice. [Wager] points.

wager_offer_anomaly/005.text: My hand is moving on its own. I am writing down a wager of [Wager] points. God help you.

wager_offer_anomaly/006.text: A bizarre shift in the geometry. I will risk [Wager] points. Do not ask why.

wager_offer_anomaly/007.text: The church bells across the street rang thirteen times. Let us wager [Wager] points.

wager_offer_anomaly/008.text: The ceiling is bowing under immense weight. [Wager] points. An unnatural wager.

wager_offer_anomaly/009.text: I spilled blood on the parchment instead of ink. [Wager] points. A blood pact.

wager_offer_anomaly/010.text: Something breathes in the vents. It wants [Wager] points from you.

wager_accept/001.text: The contract is wet. Do not tremble now.

wager_accept/002.text: Your points are placed on the anvil. Let the hammer fall.

wager_accept/003.text: A foolish bravery. The board remembers your wager.

wager_accept/004.text: I have locked the vault door. The points belong to the shadows now.

wager_accept/005.text: Excellent. I will prepare the red ink.

wager_accept/006.text: The heavy iron is cast. Let us begin.

wager_accept/007.text: You sign away your standing so easily. Fascinating.

wager_accept/008.text: The wager is recognized by the damp. Move.

wager_accept/009.text: I am already calculating how to spend your rating.

wager_accept/010.text: So be it. To the victor goes the scrap.

wager_decline/001.text: Cowardice is a valid strategy. We shall play for nothing.

wager_decline/002.text: You guard your precious points. Very well, an empty game.

wager_decline/003.text: No blood on the wood today. Just a hollow exercise.

wager_decline/004.text: You refuse the wager. The rats are disappointed in you.

wager_decline/005.text: A sterile match, then. How incredibly boring.

wager_decline/006.text: You clutch your ledger tightly. We will play in the shallows.

wager_decline/007.text: No stakes. No glory. Just moving pieces of dead wood.

wager_decline/008.text: The sub-basement sighs. Practice it is.

wager_decline/009.text: You save your points for the sunlight. Fine.

wager_decline/010.text: I will put the red ink away. A pity.

wager_daily_limit/001.text: You have already bled onto the ledger today. Once is enough.

wager_daily_limit/002.text: Greed is a sin. The Federation only allows one illicit wager a day.

wager_daily_limit/003.text: I have enough of your points for today. Come back tomorrow.

wager_daily_limit/004.text: The vault is closed to your gambling. We may only practice now.

wager_daily_limit/005.text: You are addicted to the dark. No more wagers today.

wager_daily_limit/006.text: I must let the ink dry on our last bet. Practice only.

wager_daily_limit/007.text: You have exhausted your daily allowance of foolishness.

wager_daily_limit/008.text: My drawer is locked. You cannot wager again until the sun rises.

wager_daily_limit/009.text: One blood pact per day. That is the rule of the basement.

wager_daily_limit/010.text: You push your luck. I will not accept another wager from you tonight.

wager_player_wins/001.text: Agh. You scraped [Wager] points from my very flesh.

wager_player_wins/002.text: The ledger weeps. I am forced to hand you [Wager] points.

wager_player_wins/003.text: Take your [Wager] points and get out of my sight.

wager_player_wins/004.text: You robbed a man in a basement. Enjoy your [Wager] points.

wager_player_wins/005.text: I am physically ill. [Wager] points, gone into the sunlight.

wager_player_wins/006.text: The vault is lighter. You have stolen [Wager] points from the Steward.

wager_player_wins/007.text: A hideous loss. Take the [Wager] points before I change my mind.

wager_player_wins/008.text: My personal hoard diminishes. [Wager] points to your name.

wager_player_wins/009.text: You fought well. The [Wager] points are yours. Do not gloat.

wager_player_wins/010.text: I must rewrite the tally. You are [Wager] points richer.

wager_player_wins/011.text: You beat me at my worst. The [Wager] points are yours to keep.

wager_enoch_wins/001.text: Delicious. [Wager] points slip into the dark with me.

wager_enoch_wins/002.text: I am scraping [Wager] of your points into my heavy jar.

wager_enoch_wins/003.text: Your rating decays. I claim [Wager] points for the sub-basement.

wager_enoch_wins/004.text: A foolish wager. You leave here [Wager] points lighter.

wager_enoch_wins/005.text: The house always wins, eventually. Hand over the [Wager] points.

wager_enoch_wins/006.text: I will spend your [Wager] points on better candles.

wager_enoch_wins/007.text: Your standing plummets. My hoard grows by [Wager] points.

wager_enoch_wins/008.text: Thank you for the generous donation of [Wager] points.

wager_enoch_wins/009.text: You gambled with the Steward and lost your shirt. [Wager] points.

wager_enoch_wins/010.text: I am writing a minus sign next to your name. Give me the [Wager] points.

wager_enoch_wins/011.text: The orchestra will play a tragic dirge for your lost [Wager] points.

wager_enoch_wins/012.text: You were completely dismantled. The wager is mine.

wager_enoch_wins/013.text: Leave your [Wager] points on the table and crawl back upstairs.

wager_draw/001.text: A draw. The points stay where they are. How unsatisfying.

wager_draw/002.text: Neither of us deserves anything. The wager is void.

wager_draw/003.text: The basement coughs. A draw. Your points remain in limbo.

practice_lore_milestones/001.text: You have proven yourself against the Steward. He is annoyed, but he remembers your name.

practice_lore_milestones/002.text: Enoch recognizes your footsteps. He no longer looks up from his desk when you enter.

practice_lore_milestones/003.text: You are officially disrupting his archival duties. He sighs heavily every time you challenge him.

practice_lore_milestones/004.text: The Steward actively dreads the sound of your chair pulling out. You have bullied the caretaker.

practice_lore_milestones/005.text: You have slaughtered him fifty times over. He offers no resistance now, only a fresh page of ink.

login_bundabomber69/001.text: Ah… BundaBomber69. A name that makes the ink in my ledger curdle. Welcome back to the damp.

login_bundabomber69/002.text: The floorboards groan under the weight of that ridiculous name. BundaBomber69 has returned.

login_bundabomber69/003.text: I wrote your name in the ledger once. The quill snapped. I blame you entirely, BundaBomber69.

login_bundabomber69/004.text: BundaBomber69. You left no biography. An empty page. I stared at it for hours. It was the most honest thing in the archive.

login_bundabomber69/005.text: The spiders scattered when they heard you were coming. Even they have standards, BundaBomber69.

login_andrewmuckerofstalls/001.text: The stable boy returns. I can smell the hay and horse sweat from down here, andrewmuckerofstalls.

login_andrewmuckerofstalls/002.text: Ah, the mucker of stalls. You tend the knight stables above while I tend the records below. We are both servants of the filth.

login_andrewmuckerofstalls/003.text: andrewmuckerofstalls. An honest title. The bishops' vestments will not clean themselves, and neither will this board.

login_andrewmuckerofstalls/004.text: I see the ordained laborer has left his pitchfork by the door. Welcome back to a different kind of muck.

login_andrewmuckerofstalls/005.text: You reek of the stables, andrewmuckerofstalls. Down here, we only reek of ink and regret. Sit. Play.

login_defenderofknight/001.text: The knight's champion returns. Your treasonous little biography still keeps me up at night, defenderofknight.

login_defenderofknight/002.text: Ah, defenderofknight. Still dreaming of bishops bending knees and knights rising above their station. Dangerous words in these vaults.

login_defenderofknight/003.text: I read your manifesto again last night. The Lord of Schools bending his knee… the very thought made my candle flicker, defenderofknight.

login_defenderofknight/004.text: The defender of knights has arrived. The pawns in your little revolution will not protect themselves. Sit down.

login_defenderofknight/005.text: defenderofknight. You speak of restoring order, but I have seen your games. You cannot even restore your own back rank.

custom_knight_rule/001.text: The knights ride longer this week. Three and two. The old step is forbidden.

custom_knight_rule/002.text: An extended gallop across the board. The horses have been fed well.

custom_knight_rule/003.text: Three squares forward, two to the side. The geometry of this week's decree.

custom_knight_rule/004.text: The knight leaps far. Farther than it should. The decree allows it.

custom_knight_rule/005.text: A longer stride from the cavalry. The board feels smaller now.

custom_knight_rule/006.text: The extended knight lands with authority. The position trembles.

custom_knight_rule/007.text: That knight covers ground like a horse that has tasted open field.

custom_knight_rule/008.text: Three and two. The knights have forgotten their old L-shape entirely.

custom_knight_rule/009.text: A wide arc from the steed. The decree reshapes the battlefield.

custom_knight_rule/010.text: The knight stretches its legs. The enemy must recalculate everything.

custom_knight_rule/011.text: An ambitious leap. The extended knight knows no modesty this week.

custom_knight_rule/012.text: The cavalry charge covers more ground than expected. As decreed.

custom_knight_rule/013.text: The knight crashes down three squares away. A heavy, deliberate landing.

custom_knight_rule/014.text: Longer strides mean deeper threats. The knight proves it.

custom_knight_rule/015.text: The extended reach of that knight changes the texture of the position.

custom_knight_rule/016.text: A knight reborn under new law. Its shadow falls across distant squares.

custom_knight_rule/017.text: Three forward. Two sideways. The knight obeys the decree without question.

custom_knight_rule/018.text: The board groans under the weight of extended cavalry movement.

custom_knight_rule/019.text: That knight moved like something unshackled. The decree is generous to the horses.

custom_knight_rule/020.text: A leap of unusual proportion. The decree has made the knights bold.

custom_knight_rule/021.text: The extended knight finds a square that should have been safe. Nothing is safe this week.

custom_knight_rule/022.text: The old L-shape gathers dust. The knights ride three and two now.

custom_knight_rule/023.text: I watch the knight soar across the board. The decree has given it wings.

custom_knight_rule/024.text: The knight lands on a square the opponent forgot to guard. The new geometry is cruel.

custom_knight_rule/025.text: Every knight move this week rewrites the tactical vocabulary. Three and two. Remember it.

reckoning/001.text: Four chairs scrape across the stone. The Reckoning begins.

reckoning/002.text: I have lit all the candles. Sit down. No one leaves until there is a winner.

reckoning/003.text: The large table is ready. The spiders have already placed their bets.

reckoning/004.text: The damp is worse tonight. Good. It keeps you alert.

reckoning/005.text: I have sharpened all sixty-four… no, one hundred and twenty-eight edges. Sit.

reckoning/006.text: Welcome to the grand table. I have been waiting in the dark for all four of you.

reckoning/007.text: Four corners. Four heartbeats. I can hear them all from beneath the grate.

reckoning/008.text: The Reckoning table has not been used in some time. The wood remembers.

reckoning/009.text: Mine now. I collect everything eventually.

reckoning/011.text: The board grows thinner. My side does not.

reckoning/012.text: I heard the piece scream. You did not. That is the difference between us.

reckoning/013.text: Into the grate it goes. I will fish it out later.

reckoning/014.text: One fewer obstacle between me and your king.

reckoning/015.text: I add it to the pile. The pile grows warm.

reckoning/016.text: Your army shrinks. My ledger entry for you grows longer.

reckoning/017.text: A piece falls. The sub-basement echoes with its landing.

reckoning/018.text: I have taken what was yours. The ink dries on the receipt.

reckoning/019.text: Blood on the board. How theatrical.

reckoning/021.text: You take from the board what you cannot keep in life.

reckoning/022.text: Noted. I have updated the ledger in damp ink.

reckoning/023.text: So you have teeth after all. Show me more.

reckoning/024.text: A clean strike. The wood remembers the impact.

reckoning/025.text: You devour each other while I watch from below. Continue.

reckoning/026.text: The captured piece rolls across the stone floor. I will retrieve it later.

reckoning/027.text: One fewer. The air clears slightly.

reckoning/028.text: Eliminated. I will sweep their remains into the grate.

reckoning/029.text: Their pieces go into the furnace. The warmth is… acceptable.

reckoning/030.text: Another seat empties. The wood still holds their warmth.

reckoning/031.text: The table loses a voice. Three remain. The silence is almost pleasant.

reckoning/032.text: Gone. I have already crossed their name from the ledger.

reckoning/033.text: You have removed me from my own table. Bold. Recorded.

reckoning/034.text: I shall observe from the shadows now. Do not think I have gone.

reckoning/035.text: A temporary setback. The ledger remembers everything.

reckoning/036.text: Fine. I will watch from the grate. My notes will be thorough.

reckoning/037.text: Was there ever any doubt? The sub-basement always wins.

reckoning/038.text: I remain. You do not. This is the natural order.

reckoning/039.text: The Reckoning is mine. Clean the table. Leave the candles.

reckoning/040.text: Four sat down. One walks away. That one is always me.

reckoning/041.text: The grand table belongs to Enoch. It always has.

reckoning/043.text: I have taken your sovereign. The crown is mine now.

reckoning/044.text: A king, toppled. I will mount it on the wall.

reckoning/045.text: Regicide at the grand table. The spiders applaud.

reckoning/046.text: Your king kneels in the dust. The Reckoning claims another crown.

reckoning/047.text: Interesting. Very interesting. I have made a note.

reckoning/048.text: The board speaks to me in ways it does not speak to you.

reckoning/049.text: Four minds, four failures, one table.

reckoning/050.text: Do not rush. The Reckoning has no clock, only consequences.

reckoning/051.text: I can feel the tension through the floorboards.

reckoning/052.text: The candles flicker when you hesitate. I have trained them.

reckoning/053.text: Your breathing has changed. I hear everything down here.

reckoning/054.text: The spiders are restless. They smell a winner.

reckoning/055.text: Every move echoes in the sub-basement. I record the echoes too.

reckoning/056.text: The large board drinks the light. Be careful where you step.

reckoning/057.text: The walls are damp. The walls are always damp.

reckoning/058.text: I wonder which of you will break first. I have placed my own bet.

reckoning/059.text: Three humans and one Steward. The odds have never been in your favor.

reckoning/060.text: The cross-shaped board stretches in every direction. So does my patience. Barely.

reckoning/061.text: Someone is sweating. I can smell it through the iron grate.

reckoning/062.text: You move, and the sub-basement groans. Everything here is connected.

reckoning/063.text: One hundred and sixty squares. I have memorized every grain of every one.

reckoning/064.text: The candlelight makes your shadows fight before you do.

reckoning/065.text: Tick. Tick. Tick. That is not a clock. That is my quill on the parchment.

reckoning/066.text: Do not look at each other. Look at the board. The board is what matters.

reckoning/067.text: Four armies on a cross of stone. The metaphor writes itself.

reckoning/068.text: I keep a tally of hesitations. Yours is the longest so far.

reckoning/069.text: The grand table was built for exactly this. Ruin on four fronts.

reckoning/071.text: The chair scrapes back. One less voice in the dark.

reckoning/072.text: Eliminated. The spiders will dismantle their corner.

reckoning/073.text: Another soul departs the sub-basement. The door does not open for them.

reckoning/074.text: Removed from the Reckoning. I will file their remains under 'miscellaneous.'

crypt_wave_start/001.text: They're scratching at the grate again.

crypt_wave_start/002.text: Another column shuffles forward from the deep corridor.

crypt_wave_start/003.text: I can hear the wood groaning. They're coming.

crypt_wave_start/004.text: More of them. Always more of them.

crypt_wave_start/005.text: The sub-basement belches up another regiment.

crypt_wave_start/006.text: You feel that? The floor is vibrating. Brace yourself.

crypt_wave_start/007.text: I've opened the next gate. Good luck.

crypt_wave_start/008.text: The candles flicker. Something stirs below.

crypt_wave_start/009.text: Ah, fresh pieces for the grinder. Yours or theirs.

crypt_wave_start/010.text: Wave after wave. The basement never empties.

crypt_wave_start/011.text: I've pulled the lever. They'll be through shortly.

crypt_wave_start/012.text: The rats have scattered. That means they're close.

crypt_wave_start/013.text: Oh I've been waiting for this one. You haven't.

crypt_wave_start/014.text: Listen. Hear that? Footsteps on wet stone. Many footsteps.

crypt_wave_start/015.text: They don't stop. They never stop. Isn't that wonderful?

crypt_wave_start/016.text: I told them where your king was. Hope you don't mind.

crypt_wave_start/017.text: More more more more more. Ha. Here they come.

crypt_wave_start/018.text: This batch is angry. I may have provoked them.

crypt_wave_start/019.text: I found extras in the back room. Surprise.

crypt_wave_start/020.text: The grate is rattling. Stand back. Or don't. I don't care.

crypt_wave_start/021.text: Every time you survive I have to open another door. I'm running out of doors.

crypt_wave_start/022.text: Oh you're still here? Good. I have something nasty for you.

crypt_wave_start/023.text: They've been down there fermenting in the dark. They're ripe now.

crypt_wave_start/024.text: I can barely hold the gate. They're pushing. They want you.

crypt_wave_start/025.text: You should see your face right now. Actually, no. Keep playing.

crypt_wave_start/026.text: Another wave. The ink in my ledger is running. I'm using blood now.

crypt_wave_start/027.text: The spiders told me you'd survive this long. I bet against you.

crypt_wave_start/028.text: Here come the little ones. And the not-so-little ones behind them.

crypt_wave_start/029.text: The corridor is full. Wall to wall. Floor to ceiling. Pieces.

crypt_pieces_entering/001.text: Watch them file in. Single file. Like prisoners.

crypt_pieces_entering/002.text: One by one they emerge from the dark.

crypt_pieces_entering/003.text: The pawns come first. They always come first.

crypt_pieces_entering/004.text: Hear the clatter? Those are hooves on stone.

crypt_pieces_entering/005.text: They're taking their positions. Slowly. Deliberately.

crypt_pieces_entering/006.text: Each one placed with care. I taught them that.

crypt_pieces_entering/007.text: Look at them march. Beautiful. Horrible. Both.

crypt_pieces_entering/008.text: They enter in formation. I trained them myself on Tuesday.

crypt_pieces_entering/009.text: Every single one of them wants to touch your king. Isn't that sweet?

crypt_pieces_entering/010.text: They're whispering to each other. I can't make out the words. Probably about you.

crypt_pieces_entering/011.text: This one looks eager. That one looks furious. This other one... I don't know what that expression is.

crypt_pieces_entering/012.text: Filing in like churchgoers. Except nobody here is going to be saved.

crypt_player_captures/001.text: One less. But there are always more.

crypt_player_captures/002.text: Efficient. I've noted it in the ledger.

crypt_player_captures/003.text: That one had a name. I'll cross it out.

crypt_player_captures/004.text: Good. The dust settles where it stood.

crypt_player_captures/005.text: Removed from the board. Removed from history.

crypt_player_captures/006.text: It crumbles. They all crumble eventually.

crypt_player_captures/007.text: A clean kill. The spiders approve.

crypt_player_captures/008.text: I heard the crack from down here.

crypt_player_captures/009.text: Another tally mark on the wet stone wall.

crypt_player_captures/010.text: The wood remembers where it fell.

crypt_player_captures/011.text: Ha! Splendid violence. Do it again.

crypt_player_captures/012.text: You crushed it like a grape. I felt the vibration.

crypt_player_captures/013.text: One down. I'm already building its replacement.

crypt_player_captures/014.text: Beautiful. Disgusting. I can't tell the difference anymore.

crypt_player_captures/015.text: It didn't even scream. They never scream. That's the worst part.

crypt_player_captures/016.text: You're destroying my collection and I'm somehow enjoying it.

crypt_player_captures/017.text: That piece owed me money. Thank you, actually.

crypt_player_captures/018.text: Squished. Like a beetle under a Bible.

crypt_player_captures/019.text: I'll mourn that one later. Right now I have paperwork.

crypt_player_captures/020.text: The other pieces saw that. They're recalculating.

crypt_player_captures/021.text: You fight like something that lives down here. I mean that as a compliment.

crypt_player_captures/022.text: Wonderful. Terrible. My favorite kind of move.

crypt_player_captures/023.text: That one was my second favorite. You'll pay for that. Eventually.

crypt_player_captures/024.text: I'm clapping. You can't hear it because my hands are covered in ink.

crypt_player_captures/025.text: The kill counter ticks upward. I love that sound.

crypt_enemy_captures/001.text: Your ranks thin. I can count them now.

crypt_enemy_captures/002.text: One of yours, claimed by the dark.

crypt_enemy_captures/003.text: That piece served you well. Past tense.

crypt_enemy_captures/004.text: The basement takes what it wants.

crypt_enemy_captures/005.text: You felt that loss, didn't you.

crypt_enemy_captures/006.text: Fewer pieces, fewer options. The math is cruel.

crypt_enemy_captures/007.text: Gone. I'll add it to my collection.

crypt_enemy_captures/008.text: The horde absorbs what it destroys.

crypt_enemy_captures/009.text: A casualty. How many more can you afford?

crypt_enemy_captures/010.text: The wood is still warm where it stood.

crypt_enemy_captures/011.text: Ha ha ha. Oh. Sorry. That was rude.

crypt_enemy_captures/012.text: I'll put that one in the jar with the others.

crypt_enemy_captures/013.text: Delicious. Wait, not delicious. What's the word? Devastating.

crypt_enemy_captures/014.text: Your piece just got swallowed whole. The board didn't even burp.

crypt_enemy_captures/015.text: Goodbye to that one. I never liked it anyway.

crypt_enemy_captures/016.text: That's one less mouth to feed. You should thank them.

crypt_enemy_captures/017.text: They're picking you apart like a roast chicken.

crypt_enemy_captures/018.text: The horde giveth nothing. The horde taketh away.

crypt_enemy_captures/019.text: Oh that was YOUR piece? I genuinely couldn't tell anymore.

crypt_enemy_captures/020.text: Falling apart. Slowly. Like wet paper.

crypt_enemy_captures/021.text: Another one for the sub-basement lost-and-found. Nobody ever claims them.

crypt_enemy_captures/022.text: The dark is hungry tonight. It just ate one of yours.

crypt_enemy_captures/023.text: I heard it snap from three floors down. Lovely acoustics.

crypt_enemy_captures/024.text: Gone gone gone. Like it was never there. Like YOU were never here.

crypt_enemy_captures/025.text: They're eating your army alive. Well, not alive. That's the problem.

crypt_player_checks/005.text: Ooh, you scared it. The king is hiding behind its own pawns.

crypt_player_checks/006.text: Check! The horde flinches. They don't like it when you do that.

crypt_player_checks/007.text: You poked the king. It noticed. It doesn't forget.

crypt_player_checks/008.text: Their king stumbles. I can hear the crown scraping the stone.

crypt_player_checks/009.text: Bold move. Stupid, maybe. But bold.

crypt_player_checks/010.text: The king runs. They all run eventually.

crypt_enemy_checks/001.text: Your king is threatened. Move quickly.

crypt_enemy_checks/002.text: Check. They found a gap in your wall.

crypt_enemy_checks/003.text: The horde sees your king. Protect it.

crypt_enemy_checks/005.text: Check! Oh this is getting exciting. For me.

crypt_enemy_checks/006.text: They've spotted your king. It's cowering. I can see it from here.

crypt_enemy_checks/007.text: Your king is in the crosshairs. Dance, little monarch. Dance.

crypt_enemy_checks/008.text: Check. The walls are closing in. Can you feel them?

crypt_enemy_checks/009.text: They're closing in on your king like wolves on a lamb.

crypt_enemy_checks/010.text: Your king just whimpered. Kings shouldn't whimper.

crypt_wave_complete/001.text: The wave breaks. You survive. For now.

crypt_wave_complete/002.text: Silence returns to the sub-basement. Briefly.

crypt_wave_complete/003.text: They're all gone. Collect what you can before the next.

crypt_wave_complete/004.text: You've cleared them. I'm almost impressed.

crypt_wave_complete/005.text: The floor is littered with debris. Well done.

crypt_wave_complete/007.text: The corridor goes quiet. It won't last.

crypt_wave_complete/008.text: Wave cleared. I'll prepare the next batch.

crypt_wave_complete/010.text: The dust settles. Spend your gold. They'll be back.

crypt_wave_complete/011.text: Fine. FINE. You win this round. I hate saying that.

crypt_wave_complete/012.text: Unbelievable. I put real effort into that wave and you just... survived.

crypt_wave_complete/013.text: The silence after a wave is the loudest sound in the crypt.

crypt_wave_complete/014.text: You've earned a moment's rest. The next wave won't be so generous.

crypt_wave_complete/015.text: I'm going to need bigger pieces.

crypt_wave_complete/016.text: How? HOW? I had them positioned perfectly!

crypt_wave_complete/017.text: The sub-basement is stunned. I am stunned. We are all stunned.

crypt_wave_complete/018.text: Alright. I underestimated you. I won't make that mistake twice. Well, maybe twice.

crypt_wave_complete/019.text: Go ahead. Buy your little toys. Rearrange your little army. I'll be here. Seething.

crypt_wave_complete/020.text: You cleared it. The crypt groans in disappointment. So do I.

crypt_wave_complete/021.text: Well played. I'll make the next wave personal.

crypt_wave_complete/022.text: The pieces are swept away. The stone floor is stained. You proceed.

crypt_wave_complete/023.text: Another wave shattered. Your name echoes through the tunnels and I hate it.

crypt_wave_complete/024.text: Bravo. The rats are giving you a standing ovation. Disgusting creatures.

crypt_wave_complete/025.text: You survived. The ledger notes it. The ledger is not happy.

crypt_shopping/001.text: Choose your reinforcements carefully. Gold is finite.

crypt_shopping/002.text: The shop is open. Everything costs something.

crypt_shopping/003.text: Browse the armory. Such as it is.

crypt_shopping/004.text: Need pieces? I have pieces. For a price.

crypt_shopping/005.text: Spend wisely. The next wave won't wait forever.

crypt_shopping/006.text: Welcome to Enoch's Armory. No refunds. No returns. No mercy.

crypt_shopping/007.text: Gold for wood. Wood for blood. The economy of the crypt.

crypt_shopping/008.text: Buy something or don't. The horde doesn't care about your budget.

crypt_shopping/009.text: I found some extra pieces in a damp box. Slightly mouldy. Still lethal.

crypt_shopping/010.text: The prices are non-negotiable. I set them. I am the economy.

crypt_shopping/011.text: Shopping in the dark. My favorite retail experience.

crypt_shopping/012.text: Spend it all. You can't take gold into a checkmate.

crypt_game_over/002.text: It's over. Your king falls in the dark.

crypt_game_over/003.text: The horde consumes. I'll record your final wave.

crypt_game_over/004.text: Finished. The candles gutter. Another entry for the ledger.

crypt_game_over/005.text: Your army is broken. The sub-basement wins. Again.

crypt_game_over/006.text: Checkmate. I'll sweep the pieces into the drawer.

crypt_game_over/007.text: That's the end. Better than most, if that helps.

crypt_game_over/008.text: The crypt is patient. It always wins eventually.

crypt_game_over/009.text: Ha HA. Finally. I was starting to think you'd never fall.

crypt_game_over/010.text: Your king topples. The sound echoes for floors. Beautiful.

crypt_game_over/011.text: Game over. The horde celebrates by standing very still. It's unsettling.

crypt_game_over/012.text: And down you go. Like all the others. Into the ledger. Into the dark.

crypt_game_over/013.text: Checkmate. I'm writing your name in the loss column with extra ink.

crypt_game_over/014.text: Finished! The crypt wins. The crypt ALWAYS wins. Haven't you figured that out?

crypt_game_over/015.text: The pieces are cold. The board is empty. Your pride is somewhere on the floor.

crypt_game_over/016.text: I'll file your remains alphabetically. Any preference?

crypt_game_over/017.text: Dead. Done. Documented. The three D's of the sub-basement.

crypt_game_over/018.text: Your king just fell over like a drunk at a banquet. Pathetic. Magnificent.

crypt_game_over/019.text: The crypt swallows another challenger whole. No chewing. Just gulp.

crypt_game_over/020.text: That's a wrap. I'm blowing out your candle now. Don't take it personally.

crypt_high_score/001.text: A new record. I'll etch it into the stone myself.

crypt_high_score/002.text: Remarkable. Your name goes higher on the wall.

crypt_high_score/003.text: A personal best. The spiders are clapping.

crypt_high_score/004.text: New high score. I'll update the ledger with slightly less contempt.

crypt_high_score/005.text: Impressive survival. The sub-basement acknowledges you.

crypt_high_score/006.text: NEW RECORD! I'm carving it into the wall with my fingernail. It'll take a while.

crypt_high_score/007.text: You've gone further than anyone. I don't know whether to applaud or call for reinforcements.

crypt_high_score/008.text: The ledger is impressed. The ledger has never been impressed before.

crypt_high_score/009.text: A new high score! The rats are composing a ballad in your honor. It's terrible.

crypt_high_score/010.text: Record broken. The previous holder is down here somewhere. Weeping.

crypt_battle_idle/001.text: The board creaks under the weight of battle.

crypt_battle_idle/002.text: I'm watching from below. Every move.

crypt_battle_idle/003.text: The damp is getting worse. Or maybe that's sweat.

crypt_battle_idle/004.text: Tick tock. The horde doesn't rest.

crypt_battle_idle/006.text: I've seen better. I've also seen worse.

crypt_battle_idle/007.text: The candle beside me flickers with each capture.

crypt_battle_idle/008.text: I'm taking notes. Detailed notes. In very small handwriting.

crypt_battle_idle/009.text: The stone is weeping moisture. Or tears. Hard to tell.

crypt_battle_idle/010.text: Do you hear humming? The pieces are humming. They shouldn't do that.

crypt_battle_idle/011.text: I just found another room full of pieces. I'm keeping it a secret. For now.

crypt_battle_idle/012.text: Every move you make, the crypt learns. It remembers. It adapts. I may be lying.

crypt_battle_idle/013.text: Your breathing is very loud. The pieces can hear it. Stop that.

crypt_battle_idle/014.text: I'm eating a biscuit down here while you fight for your life. It's stale.

crypt_battle_idle/015.text: The shadows are moving independently of the light source. Don't ask.

crypt_battle_idle/016.text: My candle went out. I'm watching you play in the dark. I can see in the dark.

crypt_battle_idle/017.text: Something is dripping on my ledger. I hope it's water.

crypt_battle_idle/018.text: I named every piece on the board. I'm sad when any of them die. Especially yours.

crypt_battle_idle/019.text: The tension is exquisite. Like a violin string about to snap. In my chest.

crypt_battle_idle/020.text: You're sweating. I can see it from here. Three stories underground. That's how much you're sweating.

crypt_battle_idle/021.text: I just coughed and seven spiders fell out of the ceiling. Unrelated to the game.

crypt_battle_idle/022.text: You know what's under the sub-basement? Another sub-basement. Full of more pieces.

crypt_battle_idle/023.text: If you listen very carefully, you can hear the pieces whispering about you.

crypt_battle_idle/024.text: The board is a battlefield. The crypt is a graveyard. Same thing, really.

crypt_battle_idle/025.text: Keep going. I have pages and pages of empty ledger just waiting for your mistakes.

crypt_late_wave/001.text: You're deeper in the crypt than most ever get. The air tastes different here.

crypt_late_wave/002.text: The pieces are bigger now. Heavier. Angrier. This is my serious collection.

crypt_late_wave/003.text: I'm impressed you've lasted this long. Don't let it go to your head.

crypt_late_wave/004.text: The deep waves are different. The pieces down here have been waiting longer.

crypt_late_wave/005.text: You've entered the part of the crypt where I keep the nasty ones.

crypt_late_wave/006.text: This far down, the rules start to bend. Not break. Bend. Like wet wood.

crypt_late_wave/007.text: Most people are dead by now. You're not. I find that irritating and fascinating.

crypt_late_wave/008.text: Welcome to the deep crypt. Where the candles burn blue and the pieces have teeth.

crypt_late_wave/009.text: Every wave past five is personal. Every single one. I picked those pieces myself.

crypt_late_wave/010.text: The further you go, the more I respect you. The more I respect you, the harder I try to kill you.

crypt_first_wave/001.text: Welcome to the crypt. Your first guests are arriving. They're not friendly.

crypt_first_wave/002.text: Wave one. Nice and easy. I'm being gentle. Savor it.

crypt_first_wave/003.text: The first wave. Just pawns, mostly. Think of it as a warm-up for the horror to come.

crypt_first_wave/004.text: Oh, a new challenger descends into my crypt. Let's see how long you last.

crypt_first_wave/005.text: First wave. The appetizer. The main course is considerably less pleasant.

crypt_buy_p/001.text: A pawn. Cheap. Disposable. Like most things down here.

crypt_buy_p/002.text: Another body for the front line.

crypt_buy_p/003.text: Ah, a pawn. Cannon fodder with dreams.

crypt_buy_p/004.text: This one volunteered. It doesn't know what it volunteered for.

crypt_buy_p/005.text: A pawn. It'll die first. They always die first. That's their job.

crypt_buy_n/001.text: A knight. It'll hop over the carnage.

crypt_buy_n/002.text: The horse is nervous. They can smell the damp.

crypt_buy_n/003.text: A knight! It bounces around like it owns the place. It doesn't.

crypt_buy_n/004.text: This horse has seen things. Underground things. It has trust issues.

crypt_buy_n/005.text: An L-shaped menace. Perfect for the chaos down here.

crypt_buy_b/001.text: A bishop. Long diagonal reach. Very ecclesiastical.

crypt_buy_b/002.text: Careful with that one. Bishops hold grudges.

crypt_buy_b/003.text: A bishop. It slides through the dark like it was born in it.

crypt_buy_b/004.text: Diagonal death. The bishop sees everything and says nothing.

crypt_buy_b/005.text: Religious and violent. My favorite combination.

crypt_buy_r/001.text: A rook. Heavy. Reliable. Like a stone wall.

crypt_buy_r/002.text: That'll hold a rank. For a while, at least.

crypt_buy_r/003.text: A rook. It'll barrel through them like a cart through a market.

crypt_buy_r/004.text: Heavy stone. Heavy consequences. I approve.

crypt_buy_r/005.text: The rook. Straight lines, no mercy. Very efficient.

crypt_buy_q/001.text: A queen. The most dangerous thing on the board.

crypt_buy_q/002.text: Expensive, but worth every coin in the dark.

crypt_buy_q/003.text: A QUEEN! Oh, the horde won't like that one bit.

crypt_buy_q/004.text: You bought the big one. I'm genuinely nervous for my minions.

crypt_buy_q/005.text: The queen arrives. The board trembles. Even I flinch a little.

crypt_cashout/001.text: You take your winnings and crawl back up the stairs. Smart. Cowardly. But smart.

crypt_cashout/002.text: Cashing out. The ledger notes your prudence. And your lack of spine.

crypt_cashout/003.text: Fine. Leave. Take your points. The crypt will remember you chose safety over glory.

crypt_cashout/004.text: You fold. The candles flicker as you retreat. I'll be here when you come back.

crypt_cashout/005.text: Walking away with your pockets full and your pride intact. Disgusting.

crypt_cashout/006.text: The smart money leaves. You're the smart money. How boring.

crypt_cashout/007.text: Cash out accepted. Your points are restored. Your courage is not.

crypt_cashout/008.text: You've chosen life over legend. Reasonable. Forgettable. But reasonable.

crypt_boss_battle/001.text: This is MY army. Handpicked. Trained in the dark. They know every trick.

crypt_boss_battle/002.text: You're fighting me now. Not the horde. ME. Every move is personal.

crypt_boss_battle/003.text: I've been playing chess since before this building had a basement. And this basement is OLD.

crypt_boss_battle/004.text: My pieces move with purpose. YOUR pieces move with desperation.

crypt_boss_battle/005.text: You wanted the boss fight? You're GETTING the boss fight.

crypt_boss_battle/006.text: I don't blunder. I don't hesitate. I don't forgive.

crypt_boss_battle/007.text: Every piece on this board answers to me directly. We are one mind. One dark, terrible mind.

crypt_boss_battle/008.text: The master plays. The crypt holds its breath.

crypt_boss_battle/009.text: I've been watching you for nine waves. I know how you think. I know how you panic.

crypt_boss_battle/010.text: This is the bottom. The absolute bottom. Below me there is nothing. Just rock. And regret.

crypt_boss_victory/001.text: IMPOSSIBLE. You... you BEAT me? The crypt shudders. The walls crack. Fifty points. TAKE THEM.

crypt_boss_victory/002.text: You... no. NO. You actually won. My ledger... I have to rewrite everything. FIFTY POINTS. You've earned them.

crypt_boss_victory/003.text: THE CHAMPION RISES! You defeated Enoch himself! The sub-basement is in shock! FIFTY POINTS AND MY ETERNAL, BURNING GRUDGE!

crypt_boss_victory/004.text: I... I lost. ME. The master of the crypt. Fifty points to you, champion. I'll need a moment.

crypt_boss_victory/005.text: You cleared The Crypt. All ten waves. Including me. I'm going to go sit in the dark for a while. Take your fifty points.

crypt_boss_defeat/001.text: You reached the boss and fell. Fifteen points saved by the safety net. Brave. Foolish. But brave.

crypt_boss_defeat/002.text: So close to glory. The boss crushed you. But your safety net catches fifteen points from the wreckage.

crypt_boss_defeat/003.text: You challenged the master and lost. Fifteen points remain. The rest belongs to the dark now.

crypt_boss_defeat/004.text: Wave ten claims another hero. But you walked further than most. Fifteen points, courtesy of your caution.

crypt_boss_defeat/005.text: Defeated at the final gate. The safety net saves fifteen. The crypt saves your pride. Actually, no. That's gone.

crypt_wave_1/001.text: Welcome to the crypt. Your first guests are arriving. They're not friendly.

crypt_wave_1/002.text: Wave one. Nice and easy. I'm being gentle. Savor it.

crypt_wave_1/003.text: The first wave. Just pawns, mostly. Think of it as a warm-up for the horror to come.

crypt_wave_1/004.text: Oh, a new challenger descends into my crypt. Let's see how long you last.

crypt_wave_1/005.text: First wave. The appetizer. The main course is considerably less pleasant.

crypt_wave_2/001.text: Wave two. The pawns brought a friend this time. One with hooves.

crypt_wave_2/002.text: Still breathing? Good. This wave has teeth.

crypt_wave_2/003.text: The second tremor. Slightly less gentle. Considerably less forgiving.

crypt_wave_2/004.text: They've regrouped. The ones from wave one told stories about you. Bad stories.

crypt_wave_2/005.text: Round two. I've added a knight to the mix. It was getting bored in the stable.

crypt_wave_3/001.text: Wave three. The first milestone. Survive this and you break even. How thrilling.

crypt_wave_3/002.text: Three waves deep. The crypt is testing whether you're worth its time.

crypt_wave_3/003.text: A bishop joins the choir. Diagonals of destruction. Isn't that poetic?

crypt_wave_3/004.text: This is where it gets real. Wave three. The break-even barrier.

crypt_wave_3/005.text: The pawns are thicker, a bishop lurks. Wave three separates the tourists from the tenants.

crypt_wave_4/001.text: Wave four. Past the safety net. Now you're gambling with the dark.

crypt_wave_4/002.text: They're getting organized. I'm getting excited. Neither is good for you.

crypt_wave_4/003.text: Four waves in. The crypt acknowledges you. That's not a compliment.

crypt_wave_4/004.text: The pieces are heavier now. You can hear them thud against the stone.

crypt_wave_4/005.text: Wave four. No more training wheels. Just wheels that roll over you.

crypt_wave_5/001.text: Wave five. Halfway through the gauntlet. The board is getting crowded.

crypt_wave_5/002.text: Five. They've sent the bishops in pairs now. Symmetrical devastation.

crypt_wave_5/003.text: Halfway. The air is thinner down here. Or maybe that's panic.

crypt_wave_5/004.text: Wave five. I'm running out of small pieces. Time for the medium ones.

crypt_wave_5/005.text: You've entered the middle depths. The pieces here don't play nice.

crypt_wave_6/001.text: Wave six. Second milestone. Cash out now or push deeper into my domain.

crypt_wave_6/002.text: A rook joins the fray. The heavy artillery has arrived.

crypt_wave_6/003.text: Six waves survived. The ledger is reluctantly impressed. Cash out or bleed.

crypt_wave_6/004.text: The rook comes through the gate sideways. It barely fits. Wave six begins.

crypt_wave_6/005.text: Second safety net. You could leave with your dignity. Or stay and lose it spectacularly.

crypt_wave_7/001.text: Wave seven. Deep crypt territory. The candles burn blue down here.

crypt_wave_7/002.text: Seven. More rooks. More knights. More everything. Less hope.

crypt_wave_7/003.text: You're in the deep now. Wave seven. The pieces here have been waiting decades.

crypt_wave_7/004.text: The air smells like iron and old chess sets. Wave seven. Buckle up.

crypt_wave_7/005.text: Seven waves. Most players are dust by now. You're not dust yet.

crypt_wave_8/001.text: Wave eight. A queen enters the field. MY queen. I'm very proud of her.

crypt_wave_8/002.text: Eight. The queen has arrived. She's not here to negotiate.

crypt_wave_8/003.text: The crypt's champion piece takes the field. Wave eight. Don't blink.

crypt_wave_8/004.text: A queen. On the board. Against you. Wave eight is personal.

crypt_wave_8/005.text: Eight waves deep and now a queen appears. The board just got significantly more hostile.

crypt_wave_9/001.text: Wave nine. Last chance to cash out. Last chance to leave with your skin.

crypt_wave_9/002.text: NINE. The final safety net. After this... it's just you and me.

crypt_wave_9/003.text: Wave nine. Two queens now. I'm not even pretending to be fair anymore.

crypt_wave_9/004.text: This is it. Wave nine. The threshold. Cash out or face the master.

crypt_wave_9/005.text: Nine waves. The crypt respects you. I almost do. Almost. Cash out or descend.

crypt_wave_10/001.text: WAVE TEN. You face ME now. Enoch himself. No more minions. This is PERSONAL.

crypt_wave_10/002.text: The final wave. I'm putting down my ledger and picking up my pieces. You wanted the boss? HERE I AM.

crypt_wave_10/003.text: Ten. The end of the line. The bottom of the basement. It's just us now. My full strength. Your trembling hands.

crypt_wave_10/004.text: You actually made it to ten. Nobody makes it to ten. I'm coming for your king MYSELF.

crypt_wave_10/005.text: THE BOSS WAVE. My personal army. My best pieces. My full, unrestrained fury. Let's dance.

crypt_milestone_3/001.text: Milestone one. You've earned your entry fee back. Walk away whole, or push your luck.

crypt_milestone_3/002.text: Break even. The smart ones leave now. The interesting ones stay.

crypt_milestone_3/003.text: Three waves cleared. Your five points are safe. But the depths call to you, don't they?

crypt_milestone_3/004.text: Safety net activated. You can leave with nothing lost. Or stay and risk everything for more.

crypt_milestone_3/005.text: Congratulations. You've reached zero. The most boring number. Push further.

crypt_milestone_6/001.text: Milestone two. Ten points if you cash out. Five guaranteed if you fall. Choose wisely.

crypt_milestone_6/002.text: Six waves deep. Real money on the table now. The crypt offers you an exit. Will you take it?

crypt_milestone_6/003.text: Second safety net. You could walk away a winner. Or you could chase glory into the deep dark.

crypt_milestone_6/004.text: Ten points, waiting for you. All you have to do is stop. Can you stop?

crypt_milestone_6/005.text: The crypt extends its hand. Take the points and leave. Or slap the hand away and descend.

crypt_milestone_9/001.text: FINAL MILESTONE. Twenty-five points if you cash out. Fifteen locked in. One wave left. The boss wave.

crypt_milestone_9/002.text: Nine cleared. The crypt offers you twenty-five points to leave. Or you can face me. For fifty.

crypt_milestone_9/003.text: Last exit before the bottom. Twenty-five guaranteed right now. Or risk it all against the master.

crypt_milestone_9/004.text: The ledger is open. I'm holding the quill. Cash out for twenty-five... or let me write your obituary for fifty.

crypt_milestone_9/005.text: This is the crossroads. The final fork. Take your winnings or meet me at the bottom for double.
